payload.tactic: transitivity{1} { Iter(Orcl).iters(ns1, ns2); } (={ns1, ns2, UF.forged, UFCMA.bad2, UFCMA.cbad2, UFCMA.log, Mem.lc, RO.m, ROout.m} ==> ={UF.forged, UFCMA.bad2}) (={ns1, ns2, UF.forged, UFCMA.bad2, UFCMA.cbad2, UFCMA.log, Mem.lc, RO.m, ROout.m} /\ uniq ns2{2} /\ (forall n0, n0 \in ns1{2} => (n0, C.ofintd 0) \in ROout.m{2}) /\ (forall n0, n0 \in ns2{2} => (n0, C.ofintd 0) \notin ROout.m{2}) ==> ={UF.forged, UFCMA.bad2}).
